exploration_notes: Added segment_match_type field across proto, generated Go code, and server evaluation logic. The proto file gets tag 10. The Go pb.go gets SegmentMatchType string field and getter. In legacy_evaluator.go, Evaluate is refactored to call a new evaluateVariant method that returns (resp, segmentMatchType, err) — Evaluate wraps it for backward compatibility. The segment operator from rules maps OR→ANY, AND→ALL. In evaluation.go, variant() calls evaluateVariant directly and populates SegmentMatchType
